name: Reliance Industries
thesisSummary: Retail and digital cash flows should support earnings compounding while the energy cycle provides optionality.
rationale: The position is being initiated after a valuation reset. Consolidated earnings expectations remain supported by Jio ARPU growth and improving retail margins. The entry is staged because energy earnings and capex intensity remain uncertain.
keyFactors: Valuation below the recent trading range
contraryEvidence: Large capex programme could delay free-cash-flow conversion
